story_section.headline: Crafted in India. Made to Last.
story_section.body: Every piece in the Kiko Living collection is made by hand — by potters in Rajasthan, weavers in Gujarat, metalworkers in Moradabad. We work directly with artisans, which means the craft stays alive and your home gets something real. Not mass-produced. Not imported. Made.

footer.tagline: Artisanal home decor from across India.
